title: Training Split — LTAFDB Segmentation & 80/20 Split
summary: Applied windowing and patient-level train/test split to the LTAFDB dataset. Record 00 excluded. MITBIH reserved for later cross-validation.
completed_tasks: Applied 30-second windows with 50% overlap across all 74 remaining LTAFDB records
Labeled each window as AFib or Normal based on dominant rhythm annotation within the window
Performed patient-level 80/20 train/test split on LTAFDB (no patient leakage between splits)
Documented class distribution (AFib vs Normal) across train and test sets
Ran bandpass filtering and resampled MITBIH signals from 250 Hz → 128 Hz for future use

next_week_plan.focus: Evaluation — use full MITBIH dataset for cross-validation
goals: Use the full 22-record MITBIH AFDB dataset as an independent cross-validation set
Apply identical preprocessing pipeline (bandpass, resample to 128 Hz, normalize, 30s windows)
Train candidate models on LTAFDB train split and evaluate on MITBIH
Compare model performance: XGBoost, Random Forest, CNN, LSTM, CNN+LSTM hybrid
Compute metrics: accuracy, precision, recall, F1, AUC-ROC
